hibernate/src/main/java/com/example/Main.general_idea: Register new entity classes (Laptop, Passport, ClassRoom) in the Hibernate configuration to support the expanded data model.
Add logic to create and persist Laptop entities before creating the Student to handle relationship constraints.
Add logic to create and persist Passport entities to support the Student's passport relationship.
Add logic to create and persist ClassRoom entities using a builder pattern to support the Student's classroom relationship.
Replace direct constructor invocation with a builder pattern for Student creation to handle complex associations.
Implement a read operation to fetch the persisted student from the database and verify data integrity.
Implement an update operation to modify the student's name and merge changes back to the database.
Implement a delete operation structure for the student entity, though the actual removal call is commented out.
Ensure Hibernate Session and SessionFactory are properly closed to prevent resource leaks.
Wrap persistence operations in try-catch blocks to handle potential database exceptions gracefully.

hibernate/src/main/java/com/example/Stud.general_idea: Replace manual boilerplate methods with Lombok annotations to reduce code verbosity.
Delete manually written getter, setter, and constructor methods now handled by Lombok.
hibernate/src/main/java/com/example/Stud.human_impl: Removed public Student(...) constructor and getId/setId/getSname/setSname/getSage/setSage methods

hibernate/src/main/java/com/example/Stud.general_idea: Explicitly define the primary key generation strategy using JPA annotations.
Introduce a one-to-one relationship with the Passport entity.
Introduce a one-to-many relationship with the Laptop entity.
Introduce a many-to-many relationship with the ClassRoom entity.

hibernate/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Project Lombok as a compile-time dependency to reduce boilerplate code.

hibernate/src/main/resources/hibernate.c.general_idea: Switched Hibernate schema generation from update to create to ensure a fresh database schema on startup.
Enabled SQL statement logging to the console for debugging purposes.
Enabled pretty-printing of SQL statements in logs for better readability.
Explicitly configured the PostgreSQL dialect to ensure correct SQL generation for the target database.

hibernate/target/classes/hibernate.cfg.x.general_idea: Switch Hibernate schema generation from incremental updates to full recreation on startup.
Enable console output of executed SQL statements for debugging purposes.
hibernate/target/classes/hibernate.cfg.x.human_impl: Added property hibernate.show_sql set to true

hibernate/target/classes/hibernate.cfg.x.general_idea: Format logged SQL statements for better readability.
hibernate/target/classes/hibernate.cfg.x.human_impl: Added property hibernate.format_sql set to true

hibernate/target/classes/hibernate.cfg.x.general_idea: Explicitly define the PostgreSQL dialect for Hibernate to ensure correct SQL generation.
hibernate/target/classes/hibernate.cfg.x.human_impl: Added property hibernate.dialect set to org.hibernate.dialect.PostgreSQLDialect
